name: Aebleskiver (Danish Pancake Balls)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, sugar, salt, and baking powder. Set aside.
2. In a mixing bowl, beat the egg yolks well. Add the cream and milk, then mix in the sifted dry ingredients.
3. Beat the egg whites until stiff. Carefully fold them into the batter.
4. Place 1 1/2 tsp of oil in each cup of a hot Aebleskiver pan. Spoon or pour in batter to cover the bottom of each cup.
5. Bake (fry) until delicately browned on the underside. Loosen around the edges with a fork, then quickly turn and brown the other side.
6. Use a cake tester to check if they are done. Be careful not to get the pan too hot, as the Aebleskiver can burn easily.
7. Serve dipped in sugar or syrup, or with good quality jam or jelly. Makes about 50. The recipe can be easily halved.
